action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval remains mean_r2=0.3702, and prior inspection outputs are still not showing full model/train definitions due truncation. Analysis: Need a reliable view of architecture and training hyperparameters before changing code; previous commands likely printed too much or the capture retained trailing sections. Decision: Run a minimal grep-based inspection of only class/function/argument lines and model parameter config.
action.command: grep -n "^class\|^def\|add_argument\|cfg =\|Residual\|Linear\|LayerNorm\|Dropout\|GELU\|SiLU" model.py train.py && python -c "import torch; ck=torch.load('checkpoints/baseline_clamp.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('ckpt cfg', ck.get('cfg')); print('epoch', ck.get('epoch'), 'val_r2', ck.get('val_r2'), 'const_n', len(ck.get('const_idx', [])))"
